name: What's workers comp vs lawsuit for chem exposure at work in Salt Lake City?
description: Comp for basics, lawsuit for extras vs non-employers.

mainEntity.name: What's workers comp vs lawsuit for chem exposure at work in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp for basics, lawsuit for extras vs non-employers.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp provides quick no-fault benefits; lawsuits target third parties for higher damages like pain/suffering.** Comp covers bills/wages; suits for negligence beyond employer.[1][6] Key factors: comp first (mandatory), then third-party if viable (e.g., faulty PPE maker). Comp limits employer liability; suits uncapped. Pursue both via experienced counsel.
